summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Caisse Pro POS features: 5 departments (Salle & Jardin, Jeux, Bar, Location, Autres), manual entry in 'Autres', validation system (pending/validated), server name on invoices, thermal 80mm ticket printing, and user management. Fixed backend bug in InvoiceCreate model to accept created_by, notes, and validation_status fields.

fixed.issue: InvoiceCreate model was missing created_by, notes, validation_status, customer_phone fields - frontend sent these fields but backend ignored them
fixed.fix: Updated InvoiceCreate model to include all required fields and create_invoice function to pass them to Invoice object

console_warnings.details: Console shows 'Encountered two children with the same key' warnings when viewing Bar department products
console_warnings.severity: Minor - cosmetic, does not affect functionality
console_warnings.affected_component: CaissePage.jsx - custom products in Bar department have duplicate IDs

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with 'Caisse2026' returns success, admin role
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with wrong password returns 401
✅ Backend: POST /api/invoices creates invoice with validation_status=pending
✅ Backend: POST /api/invoices saves created_by (server name) field
✅ Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} validates invoice (sets validated_by, validated_at)
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices returns invoices with validation_status field
✅ Backend: POST /api/invoices with all 5 department totals (salle_jardin, jeux, bar, location, autres)
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/stats returns by_department with all 5 departments
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/stats/monthly returns by_department with all 5 departments
✅ Backend: POST /api/invoices with custom item in 'autres' department
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/users creates server user
✅ Backend: GET /api/caisse/users returns users list
✅ Backend: PUT /api/caisse/users/{id} updates user (name, role)
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/caisse/users/{id} deletes user
✅ Frontend: Login page displays CAISSE PRO, Espace Maxo branding
✅ Frontend: Login with 'Caisse2026' password works
✅ Frontend: All 5 department tabs visible (Salle & Jardin, Jeux, Bar, Location, Autres)
✅ Frontend: 'Autres' department shows 'Saisie manuelle' form for custom items
✅ Frontend: Custom item added to invoice with custom name and price
✅ Frontend: Invoice saved with 'Facture enregistrée !' toast
✅ Frontend: Factures tab shows '⏳ En attente' badge for pending invoices (yellow)
✅ Frontend: Factures tab shows '✓ Validée' badge for validated invoices (green)
✅ Frontend: Invoices show 'Serveur: [name]' for creator identification
✅ Frontend: Validated invoices show 'Validé par: [name]' for validator identification
✅ Frontend: All 5 department breakdown badges on invoices (Salle&Jardin, Jeux, Bar, Location, Autres)
✅ Frontend: Admin can validate pending invoices with checkmark button
✅ Frontend: Validation changes status and shows 'Facture validée !' toast
✅ Frontend: Statistiques tab displays all 5 departments with totals
✅ Frontend: Invoice detail modal shows 'Ticket 80mm' print option for thermal receipt
✅ Frontend: Invoice detail modal shows 'PDF A4' download option
✅ Frontend: Utilisateurs tab shows user management with add, edit, delete buttons
action_items: MINOR: Fix React duplicate key warning in Bar department - some custom products have duplicate IDs
NOTE: Thermal ticket print (80mm) opens a new window with formatted receipt for thermal printers
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices with validation, custom items, and users via API during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Caisse POS system fully functional with: 5 departments (salle_jardin, jeux, bar, location, autres), validation system (pending/validated status with validated_by field), server name tracking (created_by), manual entry form in Autres department, thermal 80mm ticket printing, user management CRUD. Backend bug fixed: InvoiceCreate model now accepts created_by, notes, validation_status, customer_phone fields.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Invoices created without created_by and validation_status fields despite frontend sending them
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: InvoiceCreate Pydantic model in server.py was missing fields: created_by, notes, validation_status, customer_phone. The create_invoice function wasn't passing these fields to the Invoice object.
reproduction_steps: 2. Add items to cart and save invoice
3. Check invoice in Factures tab - created_by was empty, validation_status defaulted to 'pending' without being set from request
fix_applied: Added fields to InvoiceCreate model: customer_phone='', notes='', created_by='', validation_status='pending'
Updated create_invoice function to pass all fields to Invoice constructor
